summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Semillas Nómadas e-commerce MVP. Backend: 17/17 pytest pass (health, products CRUD, auth, orders, paypal demo flow, admin stats). Frontend: home, catalog (8 products + category filter), product detail + add-to-cart, cart badge, checkout demo pay button, admin login + dashboard (stats, product table, orders tab) all functional.

issues: Page <title> is default 'Emergent | Fullstack App' — should be 'Semillas Nómadas' (update public/index.html)
DialogContent missing aria-describedby (Radix a11y warning) on cart sheet / admin product dialog

action_items: Add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to Sheet/Dialog components to silence Radix a11y warnings
critical_code_review_comments: ADMIN_PASSWORD default ('admin123') is in source — fine for MVP demo but should be required env var in prod
JWT_SECRET defaults to 'dev_secret' — must be enforced in production
Order creation endpoint has no auth — anyone can create orders (acceptable for guest checkout but consider basic anti-abuse)
server.py is ~497 lines and still manageable; if more features added, split into routers/
seed_data_creation: Seeded by backend startup: 1 admin + 8 products. Tests created/cleaned up TEST_ products. One demo paid order ($34) was left in DB after paypal capture test (expected, not cleaned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints in pytest file verified. PayPal is in DEMO mode (returns DEMO- prefixed ids, marks order paid). Frontend testid attrs present: add-to-cart-btn, demo-pay-btn. Admin dashboard at /admin requires login at /admin/login. Test order persistence verified end-to-end.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Minor cosmetic: HTML page title not branded.
